parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox

participant "Registry Authority [Registry Submission Definition Creator]" as Creator
participant "Registry Definition Repository [Registry Submission Definition Repository]" as Repository

Creator -> Repository : 1. Create submission definition artifacts.
activate Creator
activate Repository
Repository --> Creator
deactivate Creator
deactivate Repository

Creator -> Repository : 2. Update submission definition artifacts.
activate Creator
activate Repository
Repository --> Creator
deactivate Creator
deactivate Repository

Creator -> Repository : 3. Create submission definition artifacts.
activate Creator
activate Repository
Repository --> Creator
deactivate Creator
deactivate Repository

Creator -> Repository : 4. Update submission definition artifacts.
activate Creator
activate Repository
Repository --> Creator
deactivate Creator
deactivate Repository

@enduml
```
